design_philosophy: Compassionate 'Calm Design', progressive disclosure, top-left quadrant focus for KPIs, functional color for status, modular UI.

surfaces.dashboard_card: bg-white dark:bg-[#171717] border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 shadow-sm rounded-2xl p-6
surfaces.glass_header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 border-b border-gray-200/50 dark:border-gray-800/50

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-gray-700 border border-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#171717] dark:text-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 dark:hover:bg-[#262626] transition-all duration-200

tables.header: bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#171717] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 py-3 px-4
tables.row: border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-50/50 dark:hover:bg-[#171717]/50 transition-colors

charts.tooltip: bg-white dark:bg-[#171717] border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 shadow-lg rounded-lg p-3 text-sm

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case format based on their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Shadcn UI for all complex components (tabs, dialogs, selects, date pickers) but heavily customize them to match the sleek Apple/Linear/Vercel aesthetic.
Implement a robust responsive layout with a sidebar navigation and a top sticky glassmorphism header.
Use Recharts for the 6+ charts, keeping grid lines faint and using a custom tooltip that matches the dashboard card styles.
The LED Videowall Configurator MUST feature a live SVG preview with subtle animations and dimension visualizers.
Ensure dark and light modes are seamlessly integrated using Tailwind 'dark:' variants.
Avoid generic layout borders. Utilize negative space and soft ambient drop shadows to separate visual layers.
Design sophisticated empty states using standard icon + text prompts to guide users.
DO NOT use generic sans fonts for headings. Default to Satoshi (or fallback to an available premium web font), and Manrope for body text.
